sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66737" key="metakrou/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετακρούω</orth>, <sense id="n66737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">push into another position</tr_> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὴν ναῦν</foreign>): metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change one's opinion</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1069c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
